summary:
MINISTRY CALLING AND OBEDIENCE: Brandon reflects on his personal spiritual journey, revealing his deep desire to lead a healing ministry akin to Billy Burke. Despite this lifelong ambition, Brandon explains that God explicitly instructed him to focus primarily on intercessory prayer, identifying it as the necessary foundation for any future healing revival. Brandon recounts his past experiences working as a janitor for fifteen years, illustrating how true spiritual release only came when he stopped complaining and fully surrendered his attitude to God. Through deep repentance, Brandon resolves to completely yield to his current assignment of raising a prayer army, acknowledging that true spiritual elevation requires undivided obedience rather than partial submission.

GEOPOLITICAL VISIONS AND WARNINGS: Brandon details several prophetic visions concerning global politics, specifically focusing on ungodly alliances being formed by Donald Trump with nations like Turkey and Syria. Brandon identifies Turkish President Erdogan as a dangerous and demonic figure pushing for a two-state solution, which Brandon associates with divine warnings such as impending Mississippi River earthquakes and a massive hurricane targeting Mar-a-Lago. Furthermore, Brandon foresees geopolitical shifts involving Putin striking Warsaw and closing off the Black Sea in cooperation with Turkey. He also highlights profound threats from Iran, asserting that the church must intercede for the safety of Trump and his family members, including Don Jr., Eric, Barron, Tiffany, Ivanka, and Kai, to ensure Trump successfully finishes his political race.

CRIME AND INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon highlights recent domestic and international news events that confirm his previous visions, including the burning of a six-hundred-year-old church in France, which he attributes to Islamic retaliation. He discusses thwarted mass shootings and security threats during Fourth of July celebrations, specifically pointing to an incident in DeKalb County and a woman caught smuggling an AR-style pistol into a Michigan fireworks festival. Brandon also references a major FBI raid in California known as Operation Hardball, which dismantled a violent international crime ring connected to India. Looking ahead, Brandon warns of potential communication disruptions resembling a 9/11-style event, specifically involving cell phone networks in New York and Chicago.

BIBLICAL PROPHECY AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon discusses signs of the end times, noting the miraculous birth and healing of a red heifer in Galilee, which is being monitored for the future dedication of the Third Temple. He also anticipates a shocking archaeological discovery regarding the Ark of the Covenant or the Ten Commandments that will validate the Bible. Transitioning to spiritual warfare, Brandon fervently prays for the physical healing of a former Gospel Bill television actress known as Miss Lena. He passionately urges parents to protect their children from demonic influences found in secular entertainment, specifically condemning Harry Potter and Taylor Swift. Finally, Brandon stresses the critical need for authentic deliverance ministries to cast out demons rather than relying on modern medical sedation, urging believers to break away from spiritually dead churches and align only with fervent, Holy Ghost-filled congregations.
rawData: [July 9, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/jtAhMuOfFwM]-[Well, good afternoon family. Thank you for joining us again today. We're going to go ahead and pray. We're going to go over some of the things the Lord showed us last time we were together. We're going to show you some things that are in the news that are, I believe, confirmations to the visions the Lord has given us. We don't want to be flaky here. And I'm going to tell you right off the bat, everything that we do on this channel, I give all the glory to God. We had a viral video on TikTok. I thought it was on YouTube, but YouTube pulled it down. They didn't want me talking about it on YouTube, so YouTube pulled it and wouldn't even let me upload it. But TikTok, it got 2.7 million hits in the last three days. 2.7 million. That's a lot for us. And that's exciting to have that many people clicking on TikTok, Instagram, and stuff like that. Braden said, 'Dad, that was amazing what the Lord did with that.' And so we give all the glory to God and all that we say in word and deed, we give all to the glory of God. And I want you to know, we attracted the to deflect every single time. But it's exciting because to use somebody like me—that God would say, 'Hey, Brandon, I'm going to use you in these last days'—I was a janitor for 15 years, and didn't think I was ever going to stop being a janitor. And the Lord said, 'I want you to go on YouTube and I'll show you things to come, and your main job is to pray. Your main job is to pray.' People say, 'Are you prophetic? Are you this? Are you that?' I am just a prayer warrior. I just feel like that's what my main mission has always been. And as I was driving down the road yesterday, and I was going to get the parts for the septic tank and all the things that I told you about just a little bit ago—because my heart's always been healing evangelism like Billy Burke. I wanted that my whole life since I've been a kid. I watched Benny Hinn and all these others, seeing people fall out and be touched by the Holy Ghost. I would read and listen to books about Smith Wigglesworth and all these greats like John G. Lake, and I thought, 'Lord, use me for that.' And I know that's coming—healings and demonstrations and manifestations of the glory—but as I was driving down the road, the Lord said to me, 'You've not yielded fully to what I've asked you to do. You're still split.' I said, 'What are you talking about?' and I'm praying in the spirit and I started weeping. I said, 'You're right. I'm running. I don't mind doing this for you, this prayer part, but it's not where my heart's at. My heart is to see the sick healed. My heart is to do a ministry like Billy Burke.' But he said, 'Brandon, I need you.' He said, 'Do you feel like you know better than me?' I said, 'Well, I don't. My heart is no, but my actions are yes.' You know, like I know in my head I'm not better than you, but in me I feel like, well, maybe I can convince Him otherwise to do healing ministry. But He said, 'Do you not know that this is the foundation for the healing revival? This is the foundation. The prayer has to come first.' He said, 'You don't know better than me, and I know how to get it done before you do. Would you just yield to what I've asked you to do? Stop being double, going this way in your heart and doing this. Yield completely to what I've called you to do and then a mantle will come on you stronger.' When He said it, it was like you get gut-punched. I just sat there and I went, 'Ah.' So I told Diana, I said, 'I repent because I have been so divided in myself.' This is a lot of pressure. And I never looked at healing evangelism as pressure, which it probably is when you step into it, but whenever you're doing this and you're praying for the nations and you're going through the motions of this, this has been a lot of work. And He said to me, 'I want you to yield completely to it.' And so I made a vow. I said, 'I'll do everything I can as much as my heart is on the healing side, and I'll do it. But to give myself completely over to prayer, to give myself over without having that split of thinking I want to do this while I'm asking you to do that—this is what I'm asking you to do: raise up a million-man and woman prayer army.' And I say it out of my mouth, but my heart's not there. I'll go, 'Yeah, we're raising up a million-man and woman prayer army,' and we have a lot of people show up every week from all over the world and get hundreds of people saved, but my heart is always over here. I'm looking over there in the pasture, and the Lord said, 'I want you to be right here.' And so, as I was driving down the road, He spoke to me because I was asking, 'What's going on, Lord?' because I'm always checking my thermostat spiritually. Are you all in? Are you okay with the Father? Is everything good with the Lord? Where are you at with Him? And I'm always checking that thermostat. And when He corrected it, because when I crossed over from the Fourth of July and this week, I was praying over things and that's what His message was. He was talking to me about it. So, I always try to tell you where I'm at and what's going on. I want to inspire you to have a fresh relationship with the Lord. I want you to have a fresh experience that's real. It's not some religious experience that your grandma told you about. God is an ever-present help in a time of need, and He wants to be your friend. He wants to talk to you about everything. The moment you yield to Him, even with partial yield, look what He's done. But He said, 'I want this to come. I want this to be even greater in the days ahead, but you've got to not be divided in your heart toward it. Yield completely to what I've called you to do and embrace it. Pull it in. And when it's time—and I know when it's time—I'll let you do something different.' You can remember I told you, being a janitor, I said it all the time. He said, 'I want you to stop complaining about cleaning the bathrooms,' because every day I'd say, 'I hate doing this. I hate cleaning these toilets. I don't want to clean 92 toilets four times a week.' So He said, 'You've got to stop complaining.' He goes, 'When you stop complaining and yield to what I've called you to do, I'll release you from it. Die to it.' So year after year, it took me forever just to stop complaining with my mouth. And I said, 'I'm not complaining anymore.' He said, 'Yeah, you are. Your heart's full of it.' He said, 'I'm looking at the inward man. You may not say it with your mouth and complain to Diana anymore, but you complain in your heart to me.' He said, 'You're going to have to do that.' I said, 'I'm going to be here forever. I'm going to be doing this for the rest of my life.' And He said, 'No, you won't. Just keep going and give me thanks and glory for everything I've done. All that you do in word, give all glory to God. Give Him thanks and give Him praise for it.' So, I cleaned those bathrooms and every single one, 'Oh, Father, I thank you for every one of these toilets. I thank you that the people coming in here want to see a clean bathroom. They don't want to see poo on a stool. Father, I thank you, Lord, that the souls that are coming here are going to be blessed.' And I would just sit there and praise Him every single time I cleaned those bathrooms. When the kids threw up on the floor or whatever, I cleaned it up. 'Oh God, I thank You,' I'd say in my heart. I didn't have to be radical and let everybody else hear me. You don't have to be weird and flaky. But I said it in my heart and I praised Him. And then one day, He said, 'You're done.' I said, 'Done with what?' He said, 'Your assignment here. You're released. You can move on. You stopped complaining in your heart.' And I didn't even realize that I did. I started to love what I was doing; I started to embrace it. And I said, 'God, if I do this for the rest of my life, I'm okay with it. We are cleaning and I'm actually having fun with it.' How do you have fun being a janitor and cleaning 90-something toilets four times a week? Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, and then again on Sunday afternoon. You keep it clean because you have 10,000 people come through; it gets nasty. All that to be said, God released me. But it came out of when I was dead to it and I was excited about it. I'm not trying to compare; He used that as a comparison to me. What I'm doing now, He said it's different, but it's the same. I'm looking at the heart. 'But this is not an assignment of toilets, Braden. This is an assignment—I know your heart is healing evangelism, but I'm asking you to do something for Me.' And I said, 'Yeah.' So something shifted and I'm all in now. I knew in my heart, 'Lord, I'll do it until You let me go.' Prayer is not a bad thing, ladies and gentlemen. I'm not trying to be a whiner; I'm trying to tell you something that I deal with. When you get real with God, God will get real with you. You've got to stop pretending to be what you're not and realize that we're all a work in progress. No matter what level you're at, we're all a work in progress. You might be the CEO of a company or the guy that's the grunt getting coffee for the CEO. Whatever you do in word and deed, give all to the glory of God and give Him praise for it. Thank You, Lord, that wherever I'm at in this channel and what You've done with me, I embrace wholeheartedly what You've called me to do. I don't think I'm better than you. Humble yourself. You go, 'Well, I think I want to do this.' 'But I've asked you to do this. Don't you realize that this is so vital to the kingdom and to this end-time movement? Prayer is the foundation of it.' Maybe you can relate, maybe you can't, but I felt I should tell you because I believe there are so many of you that struggle with where you are. You think, 'God, how come I'm still going around in the wilderness? How come I keep seeing the backside of this desert and I keep going around this mountain? I don't understand why I'm still facing the giants the way I did five years ago, and I have not gone from glory to glory because I'm still not yielded to what You've asked me to do.' There are so many of you today who could just say, 'Hey, I don't know better than You. No matter if I'm a cattle farmer, or mowing grass, or a school teacher, or a librarian—whatever God has called you to do, do everything unto Him with all your heart.' Yield yourself over completely. Don't just do it by being obedient, but be willing and obedient. When you have a willing heart and you're obedient, you'll eat the good of the land. That's what I had for you today. I just want to encourage y'all. Be all in. Don't do it half-heartedly. Don't be divided. I'm going to do what the Holy Ghost has told me to do today with everything I have. And when I get on the other side, He's going to say, 'Well done, thou good and faithful servant.' If this is all You've got for me, Father, I yield to this mission You have for me. I give my all to You. So be all in today. All right, let's see what you have today, son. Braden has got some really interesting things. Last time when we were with you, I saw President Trump going to Turkey, and the Lord said, 'Ungodly alliances.' There'll be ungodly alliances to pray against—ungodly covenants with Turkey and Syria specifically. The Lord said, 'This man is a tyrant. He's evil. He's playing you, Trump.' I heard by the Spirit of the Lord that a two-state solution would be talked about. You're going to hear a two-state solution pushed very hard. And then I saw earthquake warnings on the Mississippi River. I think it was a 4.2, a 3.2, and a 2-point-something that are about to happen if they go with the two-state solution. The Lord said this is a warning. Then I saw a hurricane hitting by Mar-a-Lago, Miami area. It was a very massive storm. When I saw the storm coming, it was going toward Trump's Mar-a-Lago house concerning how you handle Israel, the Promised Land, the Holy Land, and a two-state solution. I saw Jared Kushner and people that would be influencing this in the days ahead. The Lord said, 'Pray,' for I saw an Antichrist spirit trying to influence President Trump's mind. As you get over there, you're just kind of in a daze. The Lord said, 'This is a demonic spirit trying to mess with him.' And I saw President Trump making ungodly alliances with Turkey and others. I saw a ham on a platter that had flies on it coming from Trump, and this man from Turkey was upset about it. He said, 'This is the way I want it to go. Don't let it go the other way. Pray.' So this is what we saw. Can you play those clips? Play that. 'Because of the President, we have a very good relationship with the new leader of Syria, and he's done an amazing job in a year and a half. He's pulled the whole country together, and I have a very great relationship with him. Somebody said, "Well, he's pretty rough to put him there." I approved him along with the President. We were the two that really wanted him, and he's done a great job. I can tell you we're going to be taking the sanctions off. I don't want him to waste his time answering that question because we're working very closely with Marco Rubio, a very famous man, great Secretary of State, and with Scott Bessent and with Pete and everybody else. We're going to be taking the sanctions off. It's time to do that. We don't want to sanction friends. It's very simple.' It's reactive. I can tell you we're going to be taking the sanctions off. I don't want him to waste his time answering that question because we're working very closely with Marco Rubio, a very famous man, great Secretary of State. Next. President, are you going to sell F-35s to Turkey? And what about the legal restrictions? Well, it's a decision we're going to make. We have a very good relationship. I would think that many people, including the people sitting right here, think, 'Why wouldn't we do that?' We have a better relationship with Turkey, and Turkey's been in many ways much more loyal than other countries that we think would be loyal. So yeah, it's something certainly we would consider. It's a great plane, the best plane by far, and it's certainly something we will consider. He's put a lot of money in, especially when it's been somebody that frankly has been more helpful to the United States than many other more traditional countries. A lot of money. Putin, who by the way has a lot of respect for the President. Remember I told you I saw Putin and him becoming—and he'll beat the war drums in the days ahead and he'll help close off the Black Sea in the days ahead. And I saw Putin on Poland striking Warsaw in the days ahead. And I said they will close off the Black Sea so that you can't get into it. Turkey will. And I said they will join with Putin. Turkey will join with Russia. And even he's saying they have a great relationship. That was it because you started talking about the war in Ukraine if you want to keep blessing. You said we're trying to end eight wars. This one's the toughest one. I know a lot of people don't agree, although I think with time they're starting to. Turkey has been a great ally for us. Turkey's been—Turkey could have gone on the other side. They know Iran very well and they know the problems with Iran, but they've been very instrumental along with a couple of other countries in helping. They could have gotten into the fight. You know, I hear some people talking about their relationship with Israel. They could have gotten into the fight; they're a very powerful military nation. They didn't do that. Maybe they didn't do that because of me. But they could have gotten into the fight on the other side. They are a nation that's been very, very good, and Turkey has been—I know it's too much praise for Turkey. I told you: ungodly alliances. Watch what happens next. Now, keep going. What are the concerns about the Russian missile defense system? Do you have those concerns about the system? Are they going to have concerns at all about anything? He's a leader of a country that he's made a much better country, a much more powerful country. And you see it, beautiful. Why? Here's what he said about the two-state solution. Okay, this is what I told you was coming. Remember I said they're going to push for a two-state solution? Ready? Go. 'I attach importance to the presence of our partners from the Istanbul Cooperation Initiative with us today. I once again emphasize that the key to lasting peace in the Middle East is a two-state solution. I would like to express that it is our collective responsibility to ensure calm, especially in Gaza and Lebanon.' So, this is exactly what the Lord said they're going to do. This is exactly what He said they were going to say. And He said, 'Watch in the days to come.' And I heard Him say, 'You need to get your dog on a leash concerning Benjamin.' Now, I don't know if he actually said it in a meeting, but I heard, 'Get your dog on a leash,' and he was talking about Benjamin. And so, I saw that's what the Lord said: ungodly alliances coming up. Now we see this man, and the Lord said he's a butcher. I don't know why he's a butcher, but the Lord said this man's a butcher. Go ahead. 'Mr. President, are you going to remove Syria from the State Sponsor of Terrorism list?' I think I will. Why wouldn't I? He's done a great job. President Erdogan of Turkey. He said that Erdogan has imperial ambitions on neighboring countries, presumably including Syria. Well, he hasn't been involved with Syria—you know, if you think he hasn't been involved with Israel at all and he's left it alone. I wouldn't say he's a friend because he's not a friend of Netanyahu, of Bibi. They don't get along, I think. But for me, he's been great. Look, Turkey's been fantastic and a fantastic ally. They're also a NATO country, and as for Israel, no president has done as much for Israel as I have—nobody even close. He's a strong person, a great leader. He's respected by everybody, including me, and we're proud to have them together. This man, the Lord said he's a bad man. That's what the Lord told me. He said that man is a bad man. You can see it on his face, his countenance. He looks demonic. He looks like the Antichrist. Look at his eyes; there's no soul. He's bad, but he's playing everybody. Okay, go ahead. And then here's him saying about Iran. There's something wrong with the way he said it. Play this: 'Liars. We make a deal, and if I make a deal with him, we have a deal. He goes out, he talks. We make a deal, everyone's agreed: no nuclear weapon. We make a deal. They go outside, talk to the press, and they say, "We never even talked about it." There's something wrong with them; they're cuckoo.' Liars. They are. I told you, they're liars. They're cheats, they're sick people. They've hurt their people. They killed 54,000 people that were protesting. When people say, 'How come they haven't taken over?' They can't take over because they're dead. They killed them. Nobody's going to take over. They have no guns, and the other side has machine guns, and they're killing them. The press doesn't report it, but they're bad people. Frankly, I don't want to waste my time with them. I'll let our wonderful negotiators keep talking if they want, but I don't see it. Is the ceasefire over? Is the ceasefire done? Is the deal dead? It's a very interesting question. To me, I think it's over. I don't want to deal with them anymore. They're scum. They're sick people, led by sick people, and they're vicious, violent people. Any questions? Strait, which they have every right to be in. And so we hit them very hard last night, and we'll probably hit them hard again tonight. I'll give them a little warning: we're going to hit them hard tonight, but we'll see how it all works out. No, I'm not happy with them. For instance, we'll have a meeting and we'll talk about the strait, which they have every right to be in. Anything else? Denuclearization of Iran, because that's what the war is. It's not a war; it's really the denuclearization of Iran, and we'll have a meeting and talk about just that. My whole thing is not about regime change. It's not about—although I think it's regime change when you de-nuke. Don't worry about it. Is this the Zelenskyy one? Are you going to take action tonight? And he said, 'I wouldn't tell you, but you know what? There's nothing I can do about it.' Yeah, I think he's pretty much redundant now. You say Kharg Island. Oh, this is the Kharg Island. This is what I thought was interesting—going after the oil island. Last night, we knocked out a piece. I said, 'Don't touch the oil because maybe we'll take over Kharg Island.' We may take over Kharg Island. There's not a thing they can do about it, but I said, "Don't hit the pipes. Just hit everything else." And they hit it. They may hit it again tonight. So, you know, I had Iran last night. And then he said he didn't come to the funeral, and then he said, "Don't kill us at the funeral." Listen to what he said. But as they're chanting "Death to America" and they were all up there upset, this is what he said about the funeral. Maybe Pete, but this wasn't supposed to be for me. Pete loved this stuff from day one. But they said to us, "Please don't kill us during the funeral." I said, "I won't." And we didn't. We didn't do anything. In fact, we made it safe for them, actually. And what happens? They try and knock out two ships, a Saudi and I guess Kuwaiti, right? Qatari in addition. Really? Three? Yes, sir. So you had Pete, but this was a... Is that it? Okay, move on. Let's go to our news here. Now, this is interesting. This is why we are praying for him, but this is what he feels inside, why he's saying it out of his mouth, what he feels is going to happen to him. And this is why we're covering him in prayer to get him over the finish line. For I saw cement blocks on his feet, and the Lord said it will be up to the church to get him over the threshold of the finish line of his presidency going into 2028. So look at what he's even saying out of his mouth. "Everything's gone. Their leaders are gone. They had leaders; they're gone. Then they had another set of leaders; they're gone. Now they have another set of leaders; they may be gone. Who knows? And you know what? I may be gone, too, because I'm their number one target. It's out all over the place. I'm their number one target because they're scum. That's the way they act, and that's the way they've done it for 47 years. But I'm doing what's right for the country. I'm doing really what's right for the world. They have to be stopped." Everything's gone. I thought I would say he's the number one target, but it's not just him; it's his kids. And the Lord said specifically Don Jr., we must pray a protection around Don Jr., Eric, and Barron, the boys. And I've seen strategic assignments concerning Don Jr. all the time. The Lord said, "Pray for Don Jr., pray for Kai, the granddaughter, who's with him all the time. Pray a hedge of protection around his kids." So, we will continue to do that today. Praying for Don Jr. And so I've brought this up for so long now. It's not just about Trump. It's about hitting the things that are close to him. So what is he saying here? He's saying, "Were you aware of any credible threat by Iran against her?" "I have threats all the time. I'm number one on their list before you. But if I go, you go, right?" But was there something specific? "Perhaps someday you want to change professions." What do you have, Daniel? All right, let's move on. It's kind of redundant. Let's go to church. Look right here. Now we have another church on fire. And the Lord warned us about churches burning. And this one's in France, 600 years old, burning in France. And the Lord said in the days ahead, you will see churches burning in France, in Canada, and America around Europe. And they will burn old churches, and it will poke a giant in the days ahead. They will burn it. And this is what the Lord said about two or three weeks ago. And so now we're seeing it. Churches burning mysteriously. Arsonists, people just setting it on fire. 600 years old. They're just burning it. And the Lord said this would be the Islamic Brotherhood retaliating against the churches. Now, I don't know if this is the Islamic Brotherhood right here, but I think it's interesting. The church is burning. That's an old church. 600 years is old. Right. And then here now we have a man. We were praying over the 4th of July, and the Lord specifically told us about mass shootings trying to take place in Chicago, Boston, Nashville, Washington, New York, etc., praying over these areas for mass shootings. So, this right here, is this a video? No, it's an article, but I do have the video. Play the video. Tonight we're getting our first look at the man accused of firing gunshots near a Fourth of July celebration that sent families running for safety. In the past 40 minutes, the DeKalb County police sent us this mug shot of Tyler Ledet. Channel 2's Renee Kleinpeter shows us the moment that many people at the event say they never expected. "I thought we'd be hearing the fireworks, and they're gone now." The sound of fireworks was suddenly overshadowed by the sound of gunfire, sparking chaos inside Cobb Stadium in Avondale Estates. People started screaming and, you know, people started getting up and started running. A lot of crying babies, a lot of very scared kids. For Justin Green and his family, the night started like any other Fourth of July celebration until it didn't. "We were watching the fireworks. They were going for several minutes, and then we heard a burst of maybe five or six shots. And I turned to my wife and I said, 'I think that's gunfire.' She was like, 'There's no way.' My wife and I turned to our kids and kind of huddled over them and shielded them." As people tried to find safety, Green says he saw officers moving in. "And as I was running, there were like three, maybe four Avondale Estates police officers, all carrying their long rifles." But he and others like Madison Silvey in the moment say there was little direction for the crowd. "I did not see any police officer because, like I said, we were just mayhem, because everybody was just running." Police say they evacuated the stadium and ultimately arrested 39-year-old Tyler Ledet. He is charged with reckless conduct and possession of a firearm by a convicted felon. Authorities say they later found two handguns and multiple shell casings after executing a search warrant at his home. "To this person, I just hope they understand that they really took something away, an innocence away from a lot of kids." No one was injured, but investigators say the case is still active. Okay, keep going. But the Lord showed, when I was praying in the spirit, I heard fireworks going off. And at the moment the fireworks started going off, I saw shootings. And I thought that was interesting because nobody got hurt. All glory to God, but it's the vision. So you hear in part, you see in part, but that was interesting to me because I'm learning. I don't have all this down pat. But as you learn and you grow, you go from glory to glory, and you're learning what the Lord is trying to show you. How do you polish the gift that God has given you? First off by yielding to it. This is interesting. Remember I said it is a pistol but it's not green? I said it is a pistol AR-style gun that is going to be used, but I saw that it looked green. It was identical but it didn't have a red clip. It's a pistol-style weapon. This was the security guard... police catch woman smuggling loaded AR-style gun into Bay City Fireworks Festival. And nothing happened from what I understand, but that was the same kind of gun, but it was a pistol. It wasn't a long stock, and I thought it was interesting. But the Bay City stopped her. She threw it over the fence. What were they going to do with it? Who knows? Because that didn't happen in Jesus' name. Thank you, Lord. Security guard, police caught a woman smuggling a loaded AR-style gun into the Bay City Fireworks Festival. It's a pistol style; it's not long, though, like I was trying to say. Yeah, an identical gun, just not green, because it looked green to me in the vision. Okay, go ahead. The church—so there's the church burning again. What was Zelenskyy doing there, getting off there at that woman? Who is that woman? Yeah. Oh, he was just doing deals with all these people. Did you see Carney with MBS? Oh, that's it. Okay. So, Carney is with MBS, who I believe is the Antichrist. MBS, Mohammed bin Salman, and he is walking with him. Play it. Can you hear what they're saying?
